Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Romano, Esq. 415-640-8188 for Plaintiff CECILIA CONTRERAS, JUAN PELAYO.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CECILIA CONTRERAS, JUAN PELAYO's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

Plaintiffs Cecilia Contreras and Juan Pelayo's motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. Granting the motion comports with California's policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings. Defendant Calvin Wiley's argument that he will be legally prejudiced by the granting of the motion lacks merit. Because no trial date has been set, Mr. Wiley has ample time to respond to the new allegations. Plaintiffs must file their proposed first amended complaint no later than May 15, 2018. It will not be deemed filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
